verses.text: “Vantungte aw, ngai un, thu kong gen ding hi. Ka thugente leitung in za hen
Ka thuhilhte guahmal bangin zu-in, ka thugente daitui bangin kia hen la, lo ngeek tunga guah phin leh ankung tunga guahzu bang ta hen
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' min ka phat ding hi. Eite' Pasian a liatna gen un
“Eite' belh Topa, a nasepna kicing a, ama sepna khempeuh thumanna ahi hi. Thumanna nei-in, mawhna a neilo Pasian hi a, amah thutangin thuman hi
Ama tungah amaute gamtat sia uh a, amaute' sitbaan'na hangin ama tate hi nawnlo uh hi. Amaute pen a lampial, a lungsim kawi khang mite ahi uh hi
A hai, ngaihsutna neilo mite aw, tua bangin Topa thuk ding na hi uh hiam? Amah pen, note a hong piangsak, note hong bawlin a hong kipsak, na pa uh hilo ahi hiam
“A beisa hunte phawk un la, khang tampi hunte ngaihsun un. Na pate uh dong le-uh cin, hong hilh ding uh a, na upate uh dong le-uh cin hong gen ding uh hi
Sang Penpa in minam dangte tungah amau' gamh pia a, mihingte a ten'na ding mun a seh ciangin vantung mi a phazah tawh a kizui-in mite' gamgi a phut hi
Ahi zongin Topa' tanh pen ama mite hi a, Jakob' suante pen a kipia ama luah ahi hi
“Amah in sehnel gam, huihpi nun'na gam sungah amaute mu hi. Amah in amaute kawi-in kem a, ama mitnauta bangin amaute kem hi
A bu a vil, a note tungah a kha a zap, a khate zakin a note a man, a kha tawh a note a pua muvanlai bangin
Topa bek mah in amaute makaih a, amaute kiangah gamdang pasian omlo hi
“Amah in leitung a sangna-ah amaute tuangsak a, amaute in gamlak pana piangte a ne uh hi. Suangpi panin amaute khuaizu hup sakin, meisuang tawh a kibang suang panin sathau a nesak hi
Bawnghon panin bawngnawi thaukhal, tuuhon panin tuunawi, tuunote leh tuutalte' thau tawh, Bashan bawnghonte leh keelte, mangbuh hoihpente tawh leenggahtui san na dawn uh hi
“Israel mite thau mahmah uh a, a lehdo thei mi suak uh hi. Note thau-in lianpi pha-in, na zol uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute a bawl Pasian amaute in nusia-in, amau a Honkhiapa thusimlo uh hi
Amaute pen pasian dangte tawh ama hazat theihna dingin gamta uh a, a kihhuai gamtatnate tawh amaute in amah hehsak uh hi
Amaute in pasian a hilo dawite, amau' theih ngeiloh pasian-te, hong suak nunung pasian thakte, na pu na pate un a theih ngeiloh pasian-te' tungah biakna a pia uh hi
Note a hong Honkhiapa na phawk kei uh a, note a hong suaksak Pasian na mangngilh uh hi
“ Topa in tua thu thei a, a tapate leh a tanute in amah hehsak uh ahih manin tua ama tate a nolh hi
Amah in, ‘Amaute' kiang panin ka mai ka seel ding a, amaute' thumong bang hong hi hiam, ka en ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a lampial khang mite hi a, cihtakna a neilo tate ahi uh hi

Amaute in pasian a hilote tawh ka hazatna ding hong bawl uh a, a milimte uh tawh kei hong hehsak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin mi-a a gen taaklo mite tawh amaute' hazat theihna ding ka bawl ding a, a hai mahmah minam khat tawh amaute ka hehsak ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hehna in mei tawhkuang a, Leinuaite' gamdong a kuang hi. Leitung leh a tunga piangte kangtum a, mualte' bulpite kuangsak hi
“ ‘Amaute' tungah siatna ka khol ding a, amaute' tungah ka thaltangte ka zang ding hi
Gilkialin amaute si ding uh a, a sa mahmah meikuang leh gunei natna in amaute netum ding hi. Keimah in amaute a pet dingin ha hiam a nei gamsate amaute a tu dingin gu a nei gulte ka sawl ding hi
Namsau in gamlakah amaute susia-in, inn sungah launa lianpi om ding a, tangval leh nungak, naungek nawi nete, samkangte tawh susia khawm ding hi
Keimah in, “Amaute gamlapi-ah ka thehthang ding a, mite lakah amaute a kiphawkna ka beisak ding hi,” ka ci thei ding hi
Amau' langte in ngaihsun khialin, amaute in, “Eite i gualzo hi. Topa in hihte khempeuh bawllo hi,” hong ci khading uh ahih manin galte' hong phin ding ka lau hi,’ a ci hi
“Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute, ngaihsutna a neilo minam hi a, amaute' sungah thu theihtelna omlo hi
Amaute a pil hi leh, hih thu theitel ding uh a, amau' thu tawpna mu ding uh
Amau a Honkhiapa in amaute zuakin, Topa in amaute piakhia kei leh bangci-in mi khat in mi tul khat delh mangin, mi nih in mi tul sawm taisakzo ding ahi hiam
Bang hang hiam cih leh i galte' pasian eite' Pasian bang hilo a, i galte' thungetna a mawkna ahi hi
Amaute, Sodom leh Gomorrah bangin siahuai uh a, gu nei-in a kha leenggah a gah leenggui tawh kibang uh hi
Amau' leenggahzu pen gulpi gu leh a gupha gul gunei gu tawh kibang hi
“Hihte kei kiangah kikholin, ka vankoihna sungah kisincip hilo ahi hiam
Phulakna leh thukkikna kei-a' hi a, a hun ciangin amaute puk ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau' gimngah hun ding hong naita a, amau' siatna ding hong tung pah hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute' vang a beina leh sila leh sila a hilote a beina a muh ciangin Topa in a mite' dikna kilangsak ding a, ama nasemte tungah hehpihna nei ding hi
Tua ciangin amah in, ‘Amau' pasian-te, a bukna uh suangpi
amaute' biakpiakna thau ne-in, leenggahzu tawh a biakna uh a dawnte koi-ah om ahi hiam? Amaute thosakin note kihuhsak un la, amaute, na kidalna uh hisak un
“‘Tu-in thei un, keimah a kicipa pen kei ka hi a, kei simloh pasian dang kuamah omlo hi. Ka that a, ka nungtasak hi. Ka liamsak a, ka damsak hi. Ka khutsung pan a honkhiazo kuamah omlo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh vantung lamah ka khut laamto-in ka kiciam a, a nungta tawntung ka hih mah bangin
a tee ka namsau taatin, thu ka khen ciangin, ka galte tungah phu ka la ding a, kei hong mudahte ka thukkik ding hi
Ka thaltangte si ka tawksak ding ding a, ka namsau in mi that ding hi — a kithatte leh a kimante, kei hong langpangte, sugawp ding hi,’ a ci hi
“ Topa' mite phat un, no minam dangte aw; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a nasemte' phu la a, alangte thuk-in, ama mite' gam-a' dingin kilemna a bawl hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Moses hong pai-in, mite' zakin amah leh Nun' tapa Joshua in hih la malte khempeuh a sut uh hi
Moses in Israel-te khempeuh tungah hih thute a gen a man ciangin
amaute kiangah, “Hih thu khempeuh limtakin zui un la, na tate un a zuih dingin na hilh theihna dingun tuni-a note tungah kong gen thu khempeuh na lungsim uhah koih un
Bang hang hiam cih leh hih pen note-a' dingin a thuneu hiloin note' nuntakna hi a, a luah dingin Jordan galkhat na paina uh gam sungah hih thu tawh sauveipi na hing ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ni mahmahin Topa in Moses kiangah
“Jerikho gallam, Moab gam sungah a om Nebo Mual, hih Abarim mualtungah kahto in. A neih dingun Israel mite tungah ka piak Kanaan gam gal et in
Hor Mual tungah na sanggampa Aaron si-in a mite kiangah a kigawm bangin, na kahtohna mualtungah si in la, na mite kiangah pai-in kigawm in
Bang hang hiam cih leh Zin gam, Kadesh khua gei-a Meribah tui phual, Israel mite lakah keimah nong upna na siasak a, Israel mite lakah a siangtho-in kei nong zahtak kei hi
Tua ahih manin na mai-ah a om gam na gal muh tei ding a, ahih hangin Israel mite ka piak gam sungah nang na pai kei ding hi,” a ci hi.
